title: senna mollissima var. glabrata
intro: Senna mollissima var. glabrata is a plant species that is a variant of Senna mollissima, which is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, primarily as a laxative and to treat digestive issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, and aiding in the treatment of constipation. Senna mollissima var. glabrata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, or tinctures, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
